question_text: Let {𝑋𝑛}𝑛≥1 be a sequence of independent random variables such that 𝑋𝑛 has Poisson distribution with mean 𝜆𝑛, where 𝜆𝑛= 𝜆+ 2𝑛⁡, 𝑛≥1, and 𝜆> 0 is an unknown parameter. Which one of the following statements is true?

options.A: 𝑖=1 is an unbiased estimator of 𝜆
options.B: 𝑖=1 is a consistent estimator of 𝜆
options.C: 𝑖=1 is a consistent estimator of 𝜆
options.D: 𝑛2 ∑ 𝑖=1 is an unbiased estimator of 𝜆
